text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much! With another year behind
me, I feel like I've peeled off my old self and
emerged as an even more disciplined class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What do you think of the new and improved me?
Don't you have a saying prepared for me?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Y-you want one of my sayings?! Um... let's
see...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! How about this? "Grapes are easier to peel
once you boil them!"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh?! So you're comparing me to a grape! Looks
like my eye for literary talent is 20/20! Naturally,
as I don't need glasses!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Boiling must refer to the hard work I've put in!
And since grapes grow in clusters...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then you must be trying to say that if you put in
the work to peel off your old self, then your
efforts will surely bear many fruits!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is a saying that truly fits me like a glove!
Thank you for the wonderful present!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(It's more of a cooking tip than a saying,
though...)
